assert_ExpectedResults.condition:
cursor > N implies
        and \E s in skeletons : s.func_name = "getData" and s.class_name = "A"    and s.visibility = "public"
        and \E s in skeletons : s.func_name = "#secret" and s.class_name = "A"    and s.visibility = "private"
        and \E s in skeletons : s.func_name = "helper"  and s.class_name = "None" and s.visibility = "public"
        and ~(\E s in skeletons : s.func_name = "constructor")
